summary: Comprehensive testing of Medieval RPG landing page Phase 4 features - 2-step registration, character dashboard, game preview terminal, 11 kingdoms section, back-to-top button, and JWT authentication completed successfully

ui_bugs.issue: User gets logged out after page reload - localStorage token not being properly restored on app startup

integration_issues.issue: Some terminal tab buttons have stability issues during click - element not stable errors
Dashboard button has overlay interception preventing clicks in some cases

design_issues.issue: Event ticker section is not visible on the page - may be styled with display:none or positioned off-screen

passed_tests: Shadow path character creation with correct starting stats
Character dashboard slide-in panel with all features
Game preview terminal section with animated content
11 Kingdoms section with grid layout and modal details
Kingdom modal interactions with proper data display
Back-to-top button appearance and scroll functionality
User login flow with valid credentials
Combat stat bars, XP display, and user profile data
Kingdom type badges and danger level color coding
Logout functionality and UI state changes
success_percentage: backend: 100% (16/16), frontend: 85% (major features working, minor interaction issues)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JWT localStorage persistence issue in AuthContext.jsx restoreSession function. Check event ticker CSS visibility. Improve element stability for terminal tabs and dashboard button interactions.
